summary: Tested backup/restore fix: Content-Type boundary bug fix in api.js, 3-collection backup, and new restore UI in DatabasePage. All 9 backend tests passed, all frontend UI elements verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup/restore fully working. GET /api/backup/download returns JSON with reservations, socios, app_settings. POST /api/backup/restore accepts multipart/form-data without boundary issue (fixed by removing explicit Content-Type header in api.js). DatabasePage shows: Respaldo Automático al PC card with badges Reservas/Socios/Apariencia, Restaurar respaldo section with file picker, and Restaurar desde archivo in Respaldos card.
